title: Jinbe Finishes the Story
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is jinbe finishes the story.
scene: The scene follows jinbe finishes the story, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: OTOHIME, QUEEN OF THE RYUUGU KINGDOM, FELLED BY AN ASSASSIN'S BULLET...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the culprit, no doubt about it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....! What do you think this would do to all her majesty's efforts?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No!! This man is a mere pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: The man who murdered queen Otohime...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What did we do to deserve this...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Have taken our efforts to live together in peace...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They stole the life of the person ...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Damn Human!!! Your death won't bring queen Otohime back to us!!!

summary: Jinbe Finishes the Story. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
